name: Jinlong Machinery & Electronic Co.,Ltd
summary: Jinlong Machinery & Electronic Co.,Ltd engages in the research, production, and sale of mini motors in China and internationally. It offers micro motors, including solid motors, coin type vibrators, and driving motors; and optoelectronics, such as mobile phone and notebook camera modules. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Yueqing, China.
